teaser: Six players, sealed temples, and a 50-minute teleport rule. Two are dead. Who could have moved to kill?
challenge_prompt: All the clues are now complete. The killer is one person and one person only; the five other players (including the deceased) never lie. The only special-effect items in the game are Bob's Poison Potion and Wall-Pass Potion. Deduce the murderer's identity and reconstruct their possible movements in committing the crime—including the route of movement, where, and whom they killed. Motive need not be considered (assume the murder was entirely on the spur of the moment).
